title: Listener
description: Listener skills and responding to language.

title: Listener 9-M
description: Follows 50 two-component noun-verb and/or verb-noun instructions (e.g., Show me the baby sleeping. Push the swing.).
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he follows (LDs) 50 two-component noun-verb and/or verb-noun instructions. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he follows (LDs) 25 two-component noun-verb and/or verb-noun instructions.

title: Listener 10-M
description: Selects the correct item in a book, picture scene, or natural environment when named, for 250 items (tested or from an accumulated list of known words). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he selects 250 different items in a book, picture scene, or natural environment when named. An accumulated list of known LDs with nouns can be used for this measure (e.g., the 240 word list from Sundberg & Partington, 1998), and children's picture books like Pictionary. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he selects 150 items in a book, picture scene, or natural environment when asked.

title: VP-MTS 6-M
description: Matches identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 6, for 25 items. (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he successfully matches 25 identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 6 (the items are not lined up on the table). 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he successfully matches 15 identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 4.

title: VP-MTS 7-M
description: Sorts similar colors and shapes for 10 different colors or shapes given models (e.g., given red, blue, and green bowls and a pile of red, blue, and green bears the child sorts the items by color). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he sorts similar colors and shapes for 10 different colors or shapes given models, but no other prompts (other than a verbal prompts such as 'sort the colors,' or 'sort the shapes'). 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he sorts similar colors and shapes for 5 different colors or shapes given models, but no other prompts (other than verbal prompts).

title: VP-MTS 8-M
description: Matches identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 8 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 25 items (e.g., matches a dog to a dog in an array that also contains a cat, pig, and pony). (T)
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he successfully matches identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 6 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 25 items. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he successfully matches identical objects or pictures in a messy array of 6 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 15 items.

title: VP-MTS 9-M
description: Matches non-identical objects or non-identical pictures in a messy array of 10, for 35 items (e.g. matches a Ford truck to a Toyota truck).
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he matches non-identical objects or non-identical pictures in a messy array of 10 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 25 items. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he matches non-identical objects or non-identical pictures in a messy array of 10 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 15 items.

title: VP-MTS 10-M
description: Matches non-identical objects (3D) to pictures (2D) and/or vice versa, in a messy array of 10 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 25 items.
scoring_criteria: 1 point: Give the child 1 point if he matches non-identical objects (3D) to pictures (2D) and/or vice versa in a messy array of 10 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 25 items. 1/2 point: Give the child 1/2 point if he matches non-identical objects (3D) to pictures (2D) and/or vice versa in a messy array of 10 containing 3 similar stimuli, for 15 items.
